raw_title: AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press
title_en: AI Hype and its Function: An Ethnographic Study of the Local News AI Initiative of the Associated Press
title_zh: AI炒作及其功能：美联社本地新闻AI计划的民族志研究
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究通过民族志方法，深入观察美联社的本地新闻AI计划，探讨AI炒作在新闻业中的实际作用和功能。
plain_summary_en: This study uses ethnographic methods to closely observe the Associated Press's local news AI initiative, examining the actual role and function of AI hype in journalism.
research_direction_zh: 探索人工智能技术在新闻业中的应用及其社会影响，特别是媒体组织如何应对技术变革和公众期望。
research_direction_en: Exploring the application of artificial intelligence technology in journalism and its social impact, particularly how media organizations respond to technological change and public expectations.
